chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-756 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for respondent No.4. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G. ***** The case history shows that counsel for the petitioners has not taken much interest in this matter and has mostly remained absent without intimation. Today, he is also absent without any intimation. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
